title: Mailer suppression request v1
$comment: Body of POST /v1/services/<service_id>/suppressions (issue #80). SigV4-authenticated like every other route on this API. The mailer cannot tell whether the caller has the address owner's consent — proving that is the caller's job (services/api mints an HMAC unsubscribe token); this endpoint only records the outcome. Idempotent.

email_address.$comment: One bare address, no display name. Stored only as a one-way hash.

reason.$comment: bounce and complaint are what the SES feedback path writes; unsubscribe is what a person clicking the link writes. Closed set so a typo cannot invent a fourth.
